hero.headline: Tech that works.
hero.subheadline: We automate processes, build custom software, and design AI systems that scale your business — without hiring more people.

services.headline: Everything you need to scale.
services.subheadline: From idea to live system. No internal IT team required.

items.title: Process Automation
items.description: We eliminate manual work using n8n, Make, and custom integrations. Connect your tools, automate full workflows, and reclaim hours every single week.

items.title: Custom Software Development
items.description: Web apps, backends, and APIs built exactly for your operation. No off-the-shelf compromises. Software that grows with you from day one.

items.title: AI Agents & Chatbots
items.description: GPT-4 powered agents that handle customer service, qualify leads, and run internal operations — 24/7, with zero human supervision.

items.title: Landing Pages That Convert
items.description: Landing pages built to sell. Fast, SEO-optimized, and connected to your marketing stack from day one.

items.title: SEO & Web Positioning
items.description: Organic traffic that converts. We optimize your technical foundation, content structure, and authority so search engines send you the right people.

items.title: Digital Architecture & Consulting
items.description: Before you build, we design. We map your digital ecosystem, spot the gaps, and define the exact architecture for frictionless growth.

why.headline: No fluff.
why.subheadline: We work like a technology partner, not a vendor. That changes everything.

items.title: No internal IT team required
items.description: We handle strategy, build, deployment, and maintenance. You stay focused on growing the business.

items.title: Delivery in days, not months
items.description: First prototype in 48 hours. No endless planning cycles. Just visible progress.

items.title: One point of contact
items.description: One studio, one responsibility. We own the full stack — from database to UI.

items.title: Built to scale
items.description: Every solution is designed to grow. More users, more volume, more features — without rebuilding from scratch.

process.headline: From diagnosis
process.subheadline: A straight process. You know exactly what's happening at every step.

steps.title: Free Diagnostic Call
steps.description: 30 minutes understanding your operation, bottlenecks, and goals. No pitch, no pressure.

steps.title: Solution Design
steps.description: We map the architecture, define the scope, and present a clear proposal with timeline and price.

steps.title: Build & Integrate
steps.description: We build, test, and connect everything. You see progress in real time. No black boxes.

steps.title: Deploy & Optimize
steps.description: We launch, monitor, and keep improving. Your system gets smarter as your business grows.

cta.headline: Ready to make technology work for you?
cta.subheadline: Book a free 30-minute diagnostic call. We'll identify your biggest opportunity and tell you exactly how to capture it.
cta.note: No commitment · No pressure · Just clarity

showcase.headline: Software that thinks
showcase.body: We embed intelligence into every layer. Your systems don't just run — they learn, adapt, and act without waiting for instructions.
showcase.codePrompt: "Qualify this lead and add to pipeline"

footer.tagline: Custom software, automation, and AI for businesses that take technology seriously.
